item.description:
• Expanded Claude integration (MCP) — Claude can now run the whole product-to-ad-kit workflow through the app's local engine: cut a product out, generate a lifestyle scene behind it (product_scene), and export every social size centered on the subject (ad_kit). Plus expand_image (outpaint / extend the canvas) and vary_image (img2img variation).
  • Stability & engine updates — under-the-hood improvements and the latest local engine.
